name: Wanjia China Securities Dividend Index Fund(LOF)
summary: Wanjia China Securities Dividend Index Fund(LOF) is a fund that tracks the performance of the China Securities Dividend Index and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to high-dividend-yielding companies in China. It is managed by Wanjia Asset Management Co., Ltd., headquartered in China.
